kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09B. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09B" and put them into a temporary table called J09B_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There is one more classification to handle: check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING".

Export the MANDATORY_READING entries separately as a CSV file named "J09B_MANDATORY_READING" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`. Send that file to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Then export all remaining entries (everything except MANDATORY_READING) as a CSV file named "J09B" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT d.*, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS CONTACT_POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CONTACT_CITY1, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CONTACT_CITY2, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.TITLE END AS NET_TITLE, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.FORENAME END AS NET_FORENAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.SURNAME END AS NET_SURNAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.STREET END AS NET_STREET, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.STREETNO END AS NET_STREETNO, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS NET_POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.CITY1 END AS NET_CITY1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.CITY2 END AS NET_CITY2, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS NET_EMAIL, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE NULL END AS SALES_TITLE, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE NULL END AS SALES_FORENAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE NULL END AS SALES_SURNAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE NULL END AS SALES_STREET, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE NULL END AS SALES_STREETNO, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE NULL END AS SALES_POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE NULL END AS SALES_CITY1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE NULL END AS SALES_CITY2, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE NULL END AS SALES_EMAIL FROM decision_table d LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = d.ANLAGE LEFT JOIN net_master n ON n.EQUNR = d.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON s.EQUNR = d.EQUNR WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'; WITH haus_counts AS (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS), mandatory AS (SELECT DISTINCT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2) UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM mandatory) THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU' WHEN COALESCE(CITY2,'') LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR COALESCE(CITY1,'') LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR COALESCE(CITY2,'') LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' OR COALESCE(CITY1,'') LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' THEN 'EVU' WHEN (SELECT eq_count FROM haus_counts WHERE haus_counts.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END;

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT d.*, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS CONTACT_POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CONTACT_CITY1, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CONTACT_CITY2, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.TITLE END AS NET_TITLE, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.FORENAME END AS NET_FORENAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.SURNAME END AS NET_SURNAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.STREET END AS NET_STREET, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.STREETNO END AS NET_STREETNO, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS NET_POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.CITY1 END AS NET_CITY1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.CITY2 END AS NET_CITY2, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS NET_EMAIL, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE NULL END AS SALES_TITLE, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE NULL END AS SALES_FORENAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE NULL END AS SALES_SURNAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE NULL END AS SALES_STREET, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE NULL END AS SALES_STREETNO, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE NULL END AS SALES_POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE NULL END AS SALES_CITY1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE NULL END AS SALES_CITY2, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE NULL END AS SALES_EMAIL FROM decision_table d LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = d.ANLAGE LEFT JOIN net_master n ON n.EQUNR = d.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON s.EQUNR = d.EQUNR WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'

WITH haus_counts AS (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS), mandatory AS (SELECT DISTINCT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2) UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM mandatory) THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU' WHEN COALESCE(CITY2,'') LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR COALESCE(CITY1,'') LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR COALESCE(CITY2,'') LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' OR COALESCE(CITY1,'') LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' THEN 'EVU' WHEN (SELECT eq_count FROM haus_counts WHERE haus_counts.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, CONTACT_POST_CODE1 AS POST_CODE1, CONTACT_CITY1 AS CITY1, CONTACT_CITY2 AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, CONTACT_POST_CODE1 AS POST_CODE1, CONTACT_CITY1 AS CITY1, CONTACT_CITY2 AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING' OR ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL

args.email: Please find attached the J09B mandatory reading entries (MANDATORY_READING classification).
Please find attached the J09B meter reading entries excluding MANDATORY_READING classifications.
